@alexmarks68 theyâre Proximity Beacons. I work in the creative technologies industry. A Proximity Beacon emits low power Bluetooth to alert devices. iOS, Android, etc. the beacons have an accelerometer, light sensor, etc... so weâre using these to help people successfully navigate a large festival. Just program them with AR/VR helpers, and schedules and such... soon as youâre in range of one of the beacons, the app will give you different information depending on which beacon youâre near... very fun stuff. ð
